title: Didi's Mods
description:
These are the mods I use to play Minecraft. There are performance and QOL mods included.

https://vanillatweaks.net
^^ For the resource pack
body:
This modpack includes all the mods I use to play minecraft. Here are some thngs included:
- Performance Enhancers
- Auto farming (Caps Lock and v)
- Auto elytra/chestplate swap
- Minimap/Worldmap
- Firework rocket keybind (r)
- Shaders (k)
- Much more :)

Thank you to [https://vanillatweaks.net](https://vanillatweaks.net) for the resource pack.
